name: Stir Fried Beef with Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef flank or boneless Sirloin steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak mushrooms in warm water until soft, about 30 minutes. Drain.
2. Rinse mushrooms and discard stems. Cut caps into 1/2 inch pieces.
3. Trim fat from beef. Cut beef against the grain into 2-inch strips. Slice strips across the grain into 1/8 inch slices.
4. Toss beef with vegetable oil, cornstarch, salt, sugar, soy sauce, and white pepper in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate for 20 minutes.
5. Break off tough ends of asparagus until stalks snap easily. Cut asparagus into 2-inch pieces.
6. Remove strings from pea pods. Place pea pods in boiling water, cook for 1 minute, drain.
7. Rinse pea pods under cold running water and drain.
8. Cut green onions into 2-inch pieces and then lengthwise into thin strips.
9. Mix chicken broth, cornstarch, oyster sauce, and sugar in a separate bowl.
10. Add vegetable oil to the wok, coat sides. Stir fry mushrooms for 1 minute.
11. Add asparagus and salt, stir fry for another minute.
12. Add wine and cook for 30 seconds.
13. Stir in chicken broth until boiling. Add beef and continue cooking until boiling.
14. Stir in cornstarch mixture and cook until thickened, about 20 seconds.
15. Add pea pods and cook for 30 seconds.
16. Garnish with green onions.
